/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/bseal_crypto_gtests.dir/crypto/TestSecureBuffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bseal_crypto_gtests.dir/crypto/TestAesGcmBackend.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bseal_crypto_gtests.dir/crypto/TestXChaCha20Poly1305Backend.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bseal_crypto_gtests.dir/crypto/TestKdf.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bseal_crypto_gtests.dir/crypto/TestKdfSecureMemory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bseal_crypto_gtests.dir/crypto/TestKeySchedule.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bseal_crypto_gtests.dir/crypto/TestCryptoBackendConcurrency.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bseal_crypto_gtests.dir/crypto/TestAesGcmRequiresHardware.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bseal_crypto_gtests.dir/crypto/TestKatVectors.cpp.o -o bseal_crypto_gtests  -Wl,-rpath,/home/igellai/miniconda3/lib ../libbseal_core.a /home/igellai/miniconda3/lib/libgtest_main.so.1.11.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsodium.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so ../libblake3_static.a ../libargon2_static.a /home/igellai/miniconda3/lib/libgtest.so.1.11.0
